instruction: How did US states get their names?
Hi, my sister and her girlfriends want me to play kickball with them. Can you explain how the game is played, so they don't take advantage of me?
output:
Kickball is a fun outdoor team sport where two teams compete against each other by trying to score points by getting their ball past the opposing team’s goal post while preventing the opposite team from doing the same. The players on offense are called “kickers” and those on defense are known as “fielders”. 
The game starts when one player from the offensive team kicks the ball towards the defending team’s goalpost. If the fielders catch or block the ball before it crosses the line then the offence gets three bases (or runs) for every successful attempt. On the other hand if the ball passes through the goal posts without being caught or blocked, the defence earns one point. Play continues until either all members of the offensive team have been put out or the entirety of the ball has crossed the goalposts. In this case, the team with more points at the end wins. 
In order to make sure everyone plays fairly, there are certain rules in place such as no running with the ball, only using your feet or legs to move the ball and not touching the ball with your hands unless its passed to you. Additionally, any contact between players must be done above the shoulders and below the neck. 
Overall, Kickball is a great way to get some exercise outside and enjoy yourself!

instruction: What is some cool music from the 1920s?
output:
The Roaring Twenties was a time of great change and innovation in popular music, with jazz becoming increasingly popular as well as new genres like swing, blues, and country emerging on the scene. Here are five songs to get you started exploring this exciting era of musical history!

"St. Louis Blues": This classic song by Count Basie & His Orchestra became one of the most iconic pieces of music from the 1920s. It's based off of the traditional folk song "Kansas City Blues", but it has become synonymous with the decade due to its upbeat tempo and memorable melody. The song reached #3 on Billboard’s Hot R&B/Hip-Hop Songs chart when it was reissued in 1986.

“Singin’ In The Rain”: This beloved classic by Chick Webb & Ella Fitzgerald is considered one of the greatest recordings ever made. Released in 1957, “Singin’ In The Rain” features Ella’s beautiful vocals over a lively big band arrangement. With its catchy lyrics and uplifting instrumental parts, it quickly rose to the top of the charts upon release and remains a timeless favorite today.

“Mood Indigo”: Written by Duke Ellington and released in 1930, “Mood Indigo” is widely regarded as one of the defining works of early jazz. Featuring a slow, mellow beat and haunting vocal harmonies, the song tells the story of unrequited love and heartbreak. Its unique sound and emotional intensity make it a perfect choice for anyone looking to explore the depths of the Jazz Age.

“I Want A Little Girl”: Originally recorded by Bing Crosby in 1941, this charming tune about parenthood has been covered countless times since then. With its lighthearted tone and playful rhythm, it makes the perfect addition to any party or gathering. Whether you want to dance around the room or just sit back and relax, “I Want A Little Girl” will have everyone singing along in no time.

“It Don’t Mean A Thing (If You Ain’t Got That Swing)”: This classic piece by Duke Ellington & His Famous Orchestra was first released in 1932 and continues to be a fan favorite even now. With its driving rhythms and sultry saxophone riffs, it captures the spirit of the roarin’ twenties perfectly. From ballrooms to juke joints, this timeless hit can bring any atmosphere alive with energy and joy.

instruction: How do I wrap a present neatly?
output:
1. Start by laying out all of your wrapping paper and tape in one place, making sure to have enough for each gift. 
2. Fold down any excess paper on either side of the package so it doesn't show when you are finished wrapping.
3. Place the package onto the folded paper with the smoothest edge facing upwards.
4. Beginning from the top flap, start rolling the paper around the package until it reaches the bottom. Make sure not to leave any gaps or creases as this will make the presentation look untidy.
5. Once the entire roll has been completed, use the tape to secure both ends of the roll together. This should create a tight seal which prevents unwrapping during transit.
6. If desired, add decorative touches such as bows, ribbons, stickers etc., but be careful not to overdo it!
7. Finally, write a personalized message on the tag attached to the package if desired.

instruction: How do I dice without slicing my finger
output:
1. Grip your knife handle firmly with one hand and place it on top of the cutting board, blade facing downwards. 
2. Place your other hand slightly above the tip of the blade and press lightly to keep the diced vegetables in place while you are dicing them.
3. Make sure not to put too much pressure as this can cause the blade to slip off the cutting board or slice into your fingers.
4. Dice away by making small, even strokes across the width of the cutting board.
5. When finished, remove your hands from the cutting board immediately and wash your hands thoroughly with soap and water.

instruction: Hi, I'm trying to solve a crossword puzzle, but I've never done one of these before. Can you help me out?
output:
1. Start with the Across clues - look for words or phrases that are related to each other and can be filled in first 
2. Look at the Down clues – try to find any additional information from them which could help fill in some of the Across answers 
3. Check if there are any repeated letters in either direction; this will give you more hints as to what words should go where 
4. If all else fails, use a dictionary or thesaurus to get ideas on possible solutions 
5. Once you have most of the answers filled in, read through the clue again and make sure your answer makes sense 
6. Finally, check the solution against the rest of the grid to ensure it fits correctly

instruction: Who is Larry Page?
output:
Larry Page (born March 26, 1973) is an American computer scientist and entrepreneur who co-founded Google with Sergey Brin in 1998. He was CEO of Google from 2001 to 2011, when he stepped down but remained Chairman until April 4th, 2019. In addition to his work at Google, Page has invested in several companies including Titan Aerospace, Planet Labs, and SpaceX. He also founded the company Calico which focuses on research into aging and life extension. Aside from technology, Page is passionate about renewable energy sources such as solar power and has been involved in various projects related to this field. He currently serves as the President of Alphabet Inc., the parent company of Google.

Page graduated summa cum laude from the University of Michigan with degrees in engineering and economics before attending Stanford for graduate studies in computer science. While there, he met Sergey Brin and together they developed what would become known as “The Google Search Engine”. After founding Google, Page and Brin quickly became two of the wealthiest people in the world due to their success with the search engine giant. They have since used their vast fortunes to invest in numerous startups and philanthropic endeavors.

In recent years, Page’s interests have shifted away from day-to-day operations at Google towards more ambitious goals like developing self-driving cars and delivering internet access via balloons. His visionary approach to business and innovation has earned him widespread acclaim and admiration throughout Silicon Valley and beyond.

instruction: What are different drawers I should have for clothes?

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Georgian  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Kubdari?
output: Kubdari (Georgian: ქუბდარი) are stuffed vegetables or minced meat rolls popular in Georgia. They can be made with either mashed potatoes or rice as a filling. The most common version consists of ground beef mixed with onions, tomato paste, spices such as coriander, cumin, paprika, garlic powder, salt and pepper. This mixture is then rolled into small cylinders and baked until golden brown. To make them even more flavorful they can also be served with a sauce consisting of yogurt, sour cream, chopped fresh herbs and spices.

instruction: do you think retinoid is effective on removing the acne? because I have a lot of it
output:
Retinol, also known as Vitamin A, has been shown to be very effective in treating and preventing acne breakouts due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Retinols are derivatives of vitamin A which can help reduce inflammation, promote cell turnover, and unclog pores. They work by increasing collagen production, reducing sebum production, and helping skin cells regenerate more quickly. 
In addition, they can improve overall complexion by evening out discolorations caused by acne scars or sun damage. This makes them ideal for those with mild to moderate acne who want to see long term results without having to use harsher medicines like benzoyl peroxide. 
However, since retinols are so potent, it’s important to start off using them at low dosages and gradually increase over time until your desired effect is achieved. It may take up to six months before seeing significant improvements but once used regularly, many people report noticeable differences within two weeks.

instruction: I'm trying to teach myself to have nicer handwriting. Can you help?
output:
1. Start with the basics - Practice writing your letters and numbers in different sizes, shapes, and orientations. This will help you become familiar with how each letter looks when written at various angles or distances from the center of the page. 
2. Use proper form – Make sure to keep your pen/pencil perpendicular to the paper while writing so that it creates consistent lines. Additionally, make sure not to press too hard on the pencil which can cause smudging and blurring of the lines.  
3. Incorporate spacing into your work– Spacing between words and sentences helps create visual breaks within text and makes reading easier for the reader. It also adds balance and elegance to your writing. 
4. Vary your strokes- Try varying the length and thickness of your strokes as this can add character and personality to your writing. 
5. Utilize diagonals and curves – Diagonals and curved lines are often used to draw attention to certain parts of texts such as headings and titles. They can be incorporated into your own writings to give them more flair. 
6. Experiment with color – Adding colors to your works can bring life and vibrancy to otherwise dull pieces. You don’t need to use multiple colors either; just one bright hue can do wonders! 
7. Don’t forget punctuation – Punctuation marks are essential elements of any piece of writing. Without them, readers may find it difficult to understand what exactly you mean. So make sure to include all necessary punctuation whenever needed.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Somali  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Canjeero?
output: Canjeero (also known as Injera) is a traditional Ethiopian flatbread made with teff flour. It's usually served alongside stews or curries but can also be eaten alone as a snack. The batter is mixed with water until it forms a thick porridge-like consistency which is then spread onto a hot griddle or skillet. Once cooked on both sides, the bread becomes lightly crispy and slightly chewy. To make your own Canjeero, start by combining one cup of teff flour with two cups of warm water in a large bowl. Stir together until all the ingredients are fully incorporated. Cover the mixture and let sit overnight at room temperature. Next day, heat a nonstick pan over medium high heat and add a tablespoon of oil. Pour the batter into the center of the pan and use a spoon to spread it out evenly. Cook for about three minutes before flipping the edges. Continue cooking for another minute or so until golden brown. Serve immediately while still hot! Enjoy!

instruction: What are the best exercises for beginners?
output:
The best exercises for beginner's depend on their goals and fitness level, but some of the most effective ones include walking or jogging, bodyweight exercises such as squats, push-ups, lunges, planks, and crunches, swimming, biking, yoga, Pilates, and strength training with dumbbells or resistance bands. Beginners should start slowly and gradually increase intensity over time to avoid injury. It’s also important to incorporate rest days into your routine so you can give your muscles time to recover between workouts. 
For those looking to lose weight, cardio exercise like running, cycling, and swimming are great options because they burn calories and help build endurance. Strength training is also beneficial since it helps tone muscle and builds lean mass which in turn boost metabolism and increases fat burning. Yoga and Pilates are excellent choices too since they focus on flexibility and core stability while helping to reduce stress levels. Finally, stretching before and after each session will improve mobility and range of motion. 
Overall, any type of physical activity is better than none at all! The key is to find something enjoyable and sustainable that fits within one’s lifestyle and schedule. With consistency and dedication, anyone can become healthier and stronger through regular exercise.

instruction: Do you know why turkeys became the official food of thanksgiving?
output:
Turkey has been associated with Thanksgiving since colonial times, when early Americans hunted wild turkeys for their annual harvest celebrations. The tradition of eating turkey at this time of year was further cemented in 1863 during the American Civil War, when President Abraham Lincoln declared a national day of thanks and ordered that "the whole Union" should be invited to join in by offering “a humble thanksgiving to our beneficent Father who dwelleth in heaven.” This proclamation included a call for all citizens to observe the last Thursday of November as a day of thanksgiving and praise. In subsequent years, presidents have issued similar declarations making Turkey the traditional dish served on Thanksgiving Day.  
The popularity of turkey as the main course of Thanksgiving meals can also be attributed to its nutritional value; it's low fat content makes it a healthy alternative to other holiday favorites like ham or roast beef. Additionally, many people find the flavor of turkey more agreeable than some of the other options available. Finally, there are cultural reasons behind the choice of turkey - it is seen as a symbol of abundance and prosperity which make it a fitting centerpiece for any feast.

instruction: I want to get better at networking at work
output:
Networking can be intimidating, but it doesn't have to be! Here are some tips for getting comfortable with networking in your professional life: 
1. Start by making connections within your own team or department - this will help you build relationships and trust quickly. 
2. Get to know people outside of your immediate circle too – find out who else works on similar projects or has similar interests as you do. This could lead to unexpected collaborations down the line. 
3. Make sure to stay connected even when there isn’t anything pressing going on; reach out periodically just to check-in and see how they’re doing. 
4. Whenever possible, offer assistance to others first before asking for something yourself. People appreciate being helpful and will remember you if you ever need their support. 
5. Don’t forget about those who helped you along the way either – show appreciation whenever appropriate so that these relationships remain strong over time. 
6. Be mindful of what you say and don’t talk negatively about anyone (even behind closed doors). Your reputation is important and gossip travels fast. 
7. Finally, always strive to maintain a positive attitude and be open to new experiences. Networking should never feel like a chore, instead make it enjoyable and look forward to meeting new people each day.

instruction: Are there any weird Christmas traditions?
output:
Yes, there are some very strange and unusual Christmas traditions around the world!  Here are just a few of them...
In Finland, people celebrate Joulupukki Day on December 6th to honor Father Christmas or Santa Claus. On this day, children leave their shoes outside so that he can fill them with gifts overnight.
In Spain, it's traditional for families to eat twelve grapes at midnight on New Year’s Eve in order to bring good luck throughout the year.
In Mexico, they have a tradition called "The Night of the Radishes", where elaborate sculptures made from radishes are displayed in local markets as part of the Christmas festivities.
In Iceland, they believe that elves come out to play during Christmas time, so many homes will display special elf ornaments to welcome them.
In Japan, they have a unique Christmas tradition known as KFC-Kurisumasu Faithful Christmas - where people gather together to enjoy fried chicken instead of a traditional turkey dinner.
And finally, in Denmark, they have a tradition of leaving a shoe filled with a carrot and a glass of beer for the horse of Saint Nicholas. The next morning, the shoe will contain either a treat or a present depending on how well behaved the horse was!

instruction: Hi, I'm interested in learning to play badminton. Can you explain the game to me?
output:
Badminton is a racquet sport played with two opposing players or doubles teams of two on opposite sides of a net. The objective of the game is for each team to score more points than their opponent by hitting a shuttlecock over the net and landing it into the court area of the other team. Each point starts when one player serves the shuttlecock from behind the service line across the net diagonally to the receiving player at the back corner of his/her own court. Players must hit the shuttlecock with the racket so that it lands within the boundaries of the court without touching the floor or any object outside the boundary lines. Points are scored only if the serving side wins the rally. A match consists of three games won by two points. 
The basic equipment needed to play badminton includes a badminton racket, shuttlecocks, and a badminton court. Shots can be made either by striking the shuttlecock with the racket or by using specialized smashes such as the drive shot, lift shot, and drop shot. Badminton also has many tactical elements including strategy, positioning, and communication between partners. It requires quick reflexes, agility, and good hand-eye coordination. With its fast pace and exciting action, badminton is a great way to stay active while having fun!

instruction: Do you know why cats always rub up against your legs?
output:
Cats often rub their bodies and heads on objects or people as part of their grooming behavior, but they also do it to mark their territory with scent glands located in their cheeks and foreheads. When cats rub against other animals or humans, they leave behind pheromones from these scent glands which can act like a form of communication. This helps them establish relationships with other cats by showing submission or dominance over another cat. 

In addition, when cats rub against something, such as your leg, they are leaving behind scents from their saliva and sebaceous gland secretions. These scents contain information about the cat’s identity, reproductive status, health, and even emotional state. By rubbing against you, the cat may be trying to communicate its trust and affection for you. It could also indicate that the cat feels safe and secure around you. Cats will usually only rub against those who they feel comfortable enough with. If this isn't the case then it might mean that the cat is feeling threatened or anxious. 

Finally, some cats may just enjoy the sensation of being stroked and petted, so if your cat loves to rub up against your legs make sure to give him plenty of attention!

instruction: I am going to try to roast a pig at home for Thanksgiving this year. What equipment and techniques do I need to successfully get a pig roasted?
output: Roasting a whole hog or pig can be intimidating, but it's actually quite simple with the right tools and technique. You will need a large roasting pan (at least 18 inches long), a meat thermometer, some kind of skewer/roasting fork, and plenty of kitchen twine. Start by prepping your ingredients - trimming away excess fat and cutting off the head and feet. Place the pig in the roasting pan breast side up and rub all over with olive oil, salt and pepper. Insert the skewers into the skin near the legs so they don’t slide around while cooking. Tie the legs together with string or kitchen twine to keep them from moving during cooking. Put the pig on a rack in the center of the oven and set the temperature to 350°F. Check the internal temperature every hour until it reaches 145-160°F as measured with a meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the shoulder. Once done, let the pig rest before carving and serving. Enjoy!

instruction: What type of soil is suitable for cactus?
output:
Cacti are adapted to grow in well-draining, sandy soils with low nutrient content and high pH levels. They prefer alkaline (higher pH) soils but can tolerate some acidic conditions as long as they don't stay too acidic over time. Cacti also need good drainage, which means avoiding clay or heavy soil types. If you have heavy soil, it may be beneficial to add some coarse gravel around your plants to help improve drainage. 
In addition, cacti require full sunlight and should not sit in waterlogged soil. Waterlogging will cause root rot and other diseases, so make sure to provide adequate drainage by adding more gravel if necessary. Finally, cacti do best when their roots are not disturbed, so try to plant them in large containers rather than small ones. This allows the roots to spread out without being confined.

instruction: How do you become an author?
output:
Becoming an author requires dedication, hard work and patience. It can be done in several ways such as self-publishing or traditional publishing. Self-publishing involves writing your book yourself and finding a way to get it published either through print on demand services like CreateSpace or IngramSpark, or by using digital platforms like Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing or Nook Press. Traditional publishing involves submitting your manuscript to publishers who will then decide whether they want to take it on for publication. 

To write a successful book, you need to have a great idea, develop characters and plotlines, create engaging dialogue, structure scenes effectively, use proper grammar and punctuation, edit and revise your work until it’s polished, and promote your book once it's released. You should also consider creating an online presence with social media accounts so readers can find out more about you and your books. Additionally, networking with other authors and industry professionals can help build relationships which may lead to opportunities down the line. Finally, don’t forget to enjoy the process! Writing is meant to be fun and creative - not stressful and overwhelming. With enough passion and determination, anyone can become an author.

instruction: What breed dog is smallest?
output: The Chihuahua is considered to be the world's smallest breed of dog, with adults typically weighing between 2 and 5 pounds (0.9-2.3 kg). The Pomeranian is another small breed which can range in size from 3 to 7 pounds (1.4–3.2 kg) depending on gender and type. Other small breeds include the Yorkshire Terrier, Maltese, Toy Poodle, Shih Tzu, Bichon Frise, Papillon, and Havanese. All these dogs are generally under 10 inches tall when fully grown. However, there are some smaller breeds such as the Fennec Fox, Chinese Crested, and Xoloitzcuintli which may reach only up to 6 or 8 inches in height. These tiny breeds require special care due to their delicate constitution but make wonderful companions for those who have the time and patience to take good care of them.

instruction: What are some species of bears that are now extinct?
output:
The following list includes several species of bears which have become extinct in recent history due to human activities such as hunting, habitat destruction and climate change: 
- The Giant Bear (Ursus maritimus) - This subspecies of brown bear was native to the Arctic islands off Alaska and Canada but became extinct around 1903 due to overhunting by early explorers. 
- Cave Bear (Ursus spelaeus) – This species lived throughout Europe during the Pleistocene epoch until it went extinct about 24,000 years ago. 
- Florida Black Bear (Ursus americanus floridanus) – This subspecies of black bear inhabited the southeastern United States before being hunted extensively for its fur from the late 18th century onwards. It eventually went extinct in the wild in the early 20th century. 
- Polar Bear (Ursus maritimus) – This species has been heavily impacted by global warming, leading to a decrease in their sea ice habitats and resulting in population declines across much of their range. As a result, they were listed as vulnerable under the IUCN Red List in 2006. 
- Spectacled Bear (Tremarctos ornatus) – This species used to live in South America’s Andean region but deforestation and poaching led to them becoming locally extinct in many areas since the mid-twentieth century.

instruction: What causes the northern lights?
output:
The Northern Lights, also known as aurora borealis, are caused by collisions between electrically charged particles released from the sun and gases in Earth's atmosphere. These particles enter our planet’s atmosphere at speeds of up to 150 miles per second and collide with atoms and molecules of nitrogen and oxygen. The energy released during these collisions creates a light show of different colors in the sky – red, green, blue, yellow, pink, purple and white. This phenomenon occurs when the magnetic field of the earth aligns itself with the solar wind, which is a stream of charged particles emanating from the Sun. When this happens, the particles enter into the upper regions of the Earth’s atmosphere where they collide with gas molecules and create beautiful displays of colorful lights across the night sky. In some cases, the display can be so bright it looks like daylight.

In addition to being created by solar activity, the Northern Lights have been linked to other natural phenomena such as volcanic eruptions, changes in the Earth’s magnetic field, and even large storm systems near the poles. They may also appear due to sudden shifts in the solar wind or fluctuations in the Earth’s electric field. Other factors include the position of the moon and its gravitational pull on the Earth’s atmosphere. Finally, the altitude of the observer plays a role; people located closer to the North Pole will often see more vivid displays than those further away.

instruction: What are some good foods to eat when you are sick? I am looking for something to make my girlfriend to eat.
output:

instruction: Why is kobe beef so damn expensive?
output:
Kobe beef, also known as Wagyu beef, is one of the most sought-after and luxurious types of meat in the world due to its high marbling content, intense flavor, and tender texture. It comes from the Japanese Black cattle breed which are raised on small family farms in Japan with specialized diets and meticulous care. This results in Kobe beef being extremely rare and highly prized by gourmet chefs around the globe. 
The cost of this delicacy can range anywhere between $20-$50 per pound depending on where you purchase it. The price tag may seem steep at first glance but when considering all factors such as the rarity of the product, the time and effort put into raising these cows, and the demand for them, the price becomes more understandable. Additionally, many people argue that the taste and quality of Kobe beef makes it well worth the money.  
Another factor contributing to the expense of Kobe beef is the limited supply available each year. Due to the strict regulations surrounding their production, only a certain number of animals can be slaughtered annually resulting in less availability than other meats. Furthermore, because of the popularity of Kobe beef, there has been an increase in counterfeit products entering the market making it difficult for consumers to know what they’re buying. As a result, buyers must pay extra attention to ensure they are getting authentic Kobe beef. 
Overall, Kobe beef is considered a premium product and commands a higher price compared to regular cuts of beef. Its unique characteristics make it a desirable choice among discerning diners who appreciate the finer things in life.

instruction: How do I clean my armpits?
output:
Cleaning your underarms can be done in several ways, depending on personal preference and hygiene needs. The most common method of underarm cleansing involves using antiperspirant or deodorant with active ingredients like aluminum chloride hexahydrate to block sweat glands from producing perspiration. You may also choose to use soap and water for regular washing. 

1. Apply antiperspirant/deodorant - This is one of the easiest methods as it requires only applying the product onto your skin. Antiperspirants contain aluminium salts which help reduce wetness by blocking the pores where sweat would normally come out. Deodorants are fragrance-based products designed to mask body odor caused by bacteria breaking down perspiration. Make sure you read the label before purchasing any product so you know what type of active ingredient(s) it contains.  
2. Soap and Water – Washing your underarms with mild soap and warm water will remove dirt and grime while leaving them feeling fresh and clean. Be careful not to overdo it though; too much scrubbing could cause irritation and damage to the delicate skin around your underarms. 
3. Natural alternatives– There are natural alternatives such as baking soda, cornstarch, coconut oil, and charcoal powder available if you prefer to avoid chemical based products. These substances work similarly to traditional antiperspirants but without the added chemicals. Some people find these more effective than other options due to their ability to absorb moisture instead of just blocking it.

instruction: How do I detail a car?
output:
1. Start by washing and drying your vehicle thoroughly to remove any dirt, dust or debris from its surface. 
2. Use a soft cloth and some automotive-grade polish to give it a quick wipe down in order to bring out its shine. 
3. If necessary, use a clay bar to help remove stubborn particles of dirt and grime beforehand. 
4. Apply a coat of wax onto all painted surfaces for added protection against environmental elements such as rain, snow and sunlight. 
5. Clean the windows inside and out with glass cleaner and a lint-free cloth. 
6. Check the tires for wear and tear and make sure they are properly inflated. 
7. Inspect the brake pads and rotors for signs of damage or excessive wear. 
8. Dust off the interior trim pieces and vacuum the floor mats and upholstery. 
9. Make sure all lights (headlights, taillights, signal lights) work correctly. 
10. Test the horn to ensure it works properly. 
11. Examine the exterior chrome accents for chips or scratches and touch up paint if needed. 
12. Check the windshield wipers for wear and replace them if necessary.

instruction: I am going to make pumpkin pie for the first time.  Can you help me?
output:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch pie dish with butter or nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together 1 cup of packed brown sugar and ¼ teaspoon each of cinnamon and nutmeg until combined. Set aside.
3. Peel, seed, and mash one large can of pumpkin in a separate bowl. Add ½ cup of packed light brown sugar, ¾ teaspoon of ground ginger, ⅛ teaspoon of salt, and 2 tablespoons of all-purpose flour; stir until well mixed. Pour into prepared pie crust.
4. Sprinkle reserved dry ingredients over top of pumpkin mixture. Gently spread evenly with a rubber spatula.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 50 minutes, or until knife inserted near center comes out clean. Let cool before serving. Enjoy!

instruction: What kind of foods do they eat in Thailand
output:
Thai cuisine is known for its balance between five fundamental taste senses - spicy, sour, sweet, salty and bitter – as well as its use of fresh herbs and spices such as coriander, lime leaves, lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime peel, chili peppers, turmeric and fish sauce. 
The staple diet consists mainly of rice or noodles served with various curries and side dishes. Popular street food includes som tum (green papaya salad), Khanom Chin (fried crêpes) , Khao Pad (fried rice), Som Tum Gor (green papaya salad with shrimp), Gai Yang (grilled chicken), and Isaan-style dishes like Khao Piak Sen (rice with fermented radish). Other popular dishes include Tom Yum Goong (spicy prawn soup), Massaman Curry (coconut milk based curry), Gaeng Keow Wan Kai (stewed catfish with green mango), Phat Thai (fried rice noodles), and Kaeng Khiew Waan Gun (curried seafood with coconut cream).
Desserts are also very popular in Thailand, including Kluay Kaek (deep fried banana cake), Mokhuey (tapioca pudding), and Khao Niaow Ma Muang (sticky rice with mango).

instruction: What are some good browser alternatives to Chrome?
output:
1. Firefox – Mozilla’s open-source web browser offers many of the same features as Google Chrome, including synchronization with other devices and built-in privacy protection tools. It also has a range of add-ons available for customizing your browsing experience. 
2. Vivaldi – This Chromium-based browser from former Opera CEO Jon von Tetzchner provides users with a wide array of features such as bookmark syncing, user interface personalization options, and advanced tab management capabilities. 
3. Brave – The latest version of this popular browser includes a built-in ad blocker, tracking prevention technology, and private data collection opt-out settings. Additionally, it supports secure encrypted connections (HTTPS) by default on all websites. 
4. Torch Lite – Designed specifically for mobile phones, this lightweight browser comes preloaded with several security and privacy features like HTTPS Everywhere, Do Not Track, and more. 
5. UC Browser – A fast and feature-packed alternative to Chrome, UC Browser boasts a sleek design, intuitive UI, and powerful download manager. Plus, its integrated ad blocker helps you save time and data while surfing the Web.

instruction: Who created the Superman cartoon character?
output:
The superhero known as "Superman" was first introduced in 1938 by two American writers, Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The pair had been working on their own comic book series called 'Action Comics' for DC Comics when they came up with the idea of creating a new hero who could fly and have superhuman strength. They named him Clark Kent and gave him the power to leap tall buildings in a single bound. This iconic character has since become one of the most recognizable figures in popular culture. He has starred in numerous television shows, movies, video games, and other forms of media over the years. His adventures continue today through various mediums such as comics, animation, and live-action films.

In addition to his creators, many artists and writers have contributed to shaping the world of Superman throughout the decades. Some notable contributors include artist Curt Swan, writer Otto Binder, and animator Bob Kane (who co-created Batman). These individuals helped create some of the most memorable stories featuring the Man of Steel including the Death of Superman story arc which saw the death of the titular character before being resurrected again later. Other classic tales like “Whatever Happened To The Man Of Tomorrow?” explore themes of mortality and legacy while still keeping true to the spirit of the character.

Overall, it can be said that Superman’s success lies not only in his creation but also in the countless contributions from talented people across multiple generations. From his humble beginnings in the pages of ‘Action Comics’ all those years ago, he continues to inspire fans around the globe with his unwavering commitment to justice and truth.

instruction: What is Atlantis?
output:
Atlantis was an ancient, advanced civilization located in what is now the Mediterranean Sea and described by Plato as "a great island power of old". It has been suggested to have existed around 9600 BC - 3150 BC, although there are many different theories about its exact location and existence. According to legend, it sank into the sea due to a natural disaster or war with other nations. The story of Atlantis first appeared in written form when Greek philosopher Plato mentioned it in his dialogues Timaeus and Critias. In these works, he wrote of a powerful empire which had control over much of Europe and parts of Africa before being swallowed up by the ocean suddenly and mysteriously. Since then, numerous searches for evidence of this lost city have taken place but none have yet yielded conclusive results. Despite this, some people still believe that Atlantis did exist and continue to search for proof.

The earliest known reference to Atlantis can be found in Plato's dialogue Timaeus from c. 360 BCE. Here, he tells of a conversation between Solon, an Athenian lawmaker and scholar who travelled to Egypt and spoke to priests about their history. He asked them if they knew anything about a great island nation that once existed beyond the Pillars of Hercules (the Strait of Gibraltar). They told him of a mighty kingdom called Atlantis which had been destroyed by an earthquake and flood. This account matches closely with later descriptions of Atlantis given by Plato in his work Critias.

In both accounts, Plato writes of a highly developed society ruled by a king whose name was Cleito. She was said to have been the daughter of the sun god Helios and one of seven sisters who were each assigned an individual portion of land on which to rule. These lands included Atlantis itself, which was situated at the centre of three large islands connected by bridges made of coral. Its inhabitants possessed advanced technology such as weapons, ships and a system of irrigation which allowed them to grow abundant crops. However, after a series of wars against other nations, the gods became angry and sent a massive tsunami to destroy the city. All that remained afterwards was a shallow muddy bay surrounded by a thick layer of salt.

instruction: How do I make escargot?
output:
Making Escargots (snails) at home can be quite easy and enjoyable! Here are some steps to follow for making your own escargots: 
1. Gather all of your ingredients, including snail shells, butter, garlic, parsley, salt, pepper, lemon juice, white wine, and any other spices you would like to use.  
2. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Place the snail shells in a baking dish. 
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat until it begins to brown. Add minced garlic and cook for about one minute or until fragrant. Remove from heat and set aside. 
4. In another bowl, mix together the chopped parsley, salt, pepper, lemon juice, white wine, and reserved butter mixture. Pour this mixture into each of the snail shells. 
5. Bake in preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed by the snails. Serve with additional freshly chopped parsley and lemon wedges. Enjoy!

instruction: What exactly causes volcanoes to form?
output:
Volcanic activity occurs when molten rock, ash and gases from Earth's mantle are forced up through cracks in the crust called magma chambers. This process can be caused by tectonic plate movement or by the build-up of pressure within the magma chamber itself due to heat and water trapped beneath the surface. When this material reaches the earth’s surface it creates a volcano. 
The exact cause of each individual eruption varies depending on its location and type. For example, some volcanoes occur as part of a chain reaction along fault lines while others may result from the melting of glaciers at the top of mountains. Other factors such as changes in temperature, gas pressures and chemical reactions also play a role in determining whether or not a particular area will experience an eruption.  
In addition to these external influences, the internal structure of a volcano plays a major role in how it behaves during an eruption. The size and shape of the magma chamber, as well as the amount of gas and liquid present all affect the intensity and duration of any given event. Furthermore, the composition of the rocks surrounding the magma chamber can influence the type of lava produced and thus determine what kind of eruptive style (e.g., effusive vs. explosive) results.

instruction: Hi, I have some falafel, but no tahini to put on them. Can you give me a recipe for making tahini?
output:
Ingredients: 1/4 cup sesame seeds, 2 tablespoons olive oil, 2 cloves garlic, juice of 1 lemon, salt and pepper to taste.
Instructions:
1. Place the sesame seeds in a food processor or blender and process until they become a paste-like consistency.
2. Add the olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt and pepper and process again until everything is combined into a smooth sauce.
3. Taste and adjust seasonings if necessary. Transfer the tahini to a jar with a lid and store it in the refrigerator up to one week.

instruction: Should I get my children a nanny? I'm so exhausted.
output:
Having a nanny can be a great option for parents who need help with childcare, but it’s important to consider all of your options before making a decision. 

Firstly, you should assess whether or not having a nanny will fit into your budget and lifestyle. Nannies are often expensive and require a significant time commitment from both parent(s) and nanny. You may also want to look at other alternatives such as day care centers which could provide more affordable rates than hiring a full-time nanny. Additionally, if you have multiple young children, then getting a nanny might not be feasible due to the amount of work they would need to do.

Secondly, think about what type of personality traits you want in a potential nanny. Do you prefer someone experienced and professional, or would you rather go with a younger, less experienced individual? Considering these factors ahead of time can save you time when searching for a candidate.

Thirdly, make sure to check references thoroughly. Ask questions regarding their experience working with kids, how they handle discipline issues, and any special skills they possess (such as CPR certification). It’s also important to ask around to see if anyone has had negative experiences with them.

Fourthly, don’t forget to discuss salary expectations upfront. Make sure to take into account taxes, benefits, and any additional expenses associated with employing a nanny. Also, decide on a schedule that works best for everyone involved.

Finally, remember to set clear boundaries between yourself and the nanny. Establish rules early on regarding things like curfew times, phone usage during work hours, and disciplinary measures. This way there won’t be any confusion later down the line.

Overall, deciding whether or not to get a nanny depends entirely upon each family’s unique situation. Weigh out all of your options carefully and make the choice that feels right for you!

instruction: When was Canada colonized?
output: Canada has been inhabited for thousands of years by Indigenous peoples, but it wasn't until 1497 when Europeans began to explore and settle in what would become known as Canada. The first permanent European settlements were established along the St. Lawrence River valley in present-day Quebec in the early 1600s. These settlements were mainly French, although there were also some English and Scottish settlers. In 1758, during the Seven Years War (also known as the French and Indian War), Britain took control of New France from the French, thus expanding British North America into what is now eastern Canada. This marked the beginning of British rule over much of modern day Canada. By 1867, with the formation of the Dominion of Canada, all of the British North American colonies had joined together to form one country. Since then, Canada has grown and evolved into its own distinct nation state, becoming independent from the United Kingdom in 1931.

instruction: How can I  use my phone less?
output:
1. Set specific times for using your device and stick to them - This will help you create boundaries around when it's acceptable to be on your phone, as well as helping you limit how much time you spend on it throughout the day. You could also set reminders or alarms to alert yourself when it’s been too long since you last put down your phone.
2. Unplug from technology at certain points during the day – Take regular breaks away from screens by going for walks, reading books, writing in a journal, meditating, or doing other activities that don’t involve looking at a screen.
3. Avoid multitasking with your devices – Focus on one activity at a time so you aren’t tempted to switch between tasks while you are trying to complete something else.
4. Donate old phones and tablets – If you have unused electronics lying around, consider donating them instead of letting them collect dust. Not only does this reduce clutter but it helps those who may not otherwise have access to these items.
5. Limit notifications – Turn off notifications for apps you don’t need to keep up-to-date with every second. That way, you won’t feel compelled to constantly check your phone for updates.
6. Download “Flipd” – An app designed to help people break their addiction to their smartphones, Flipd allows users to block distracting websites and applications for designated periods of time. It also provides motivational tips and encourages mindfulness practices such as gratitude journalling.
7. Use ‘Do Not Disturb’ mode – Setting Do Not Disturb mode prevents incoming calls, messages, and notifications from disturbing you. You can choose to allow exceptions like contacts or favorite apps if needed.
8. Get creative with charging locations – Instead of keeping your charger near your bed or desk, try placing it somewhere inconvenient (like across the room) so you’ll be more likely to remember to plug it in before it dies.
9. Find alternative ways to stay connected– Try connecting with friends through video chat platforms like Skype or FaceTime rather than relying solely on text messaging or social media.
10. Make sure your phone isn’t your main source of entertainment – Have hobbies outside of your phone that provide enjoyable distractions. Whether it’s playing sports, painting, gardening, or anything else, having interests beyond your phone can make it easier to resist its allure.

instruction: How did mankind discover that the earth was spherical, and why did they initially believe it to be flat?
output:
Mankind discovered that the Earth was spherical through centuries of observation and experimentation. Early civilizations such as Ancient Greeks and Romans believed in a flat Earth due to their limited understanding of geometry and astronomy at the time. This belief stemmed from the fact that when looking up into the night sky, one could only see what appeared to be a flat surface with the sun, moon, and stars all appearing to move across this plane. 

However, over time, more advanced mathematical models were developed which allowed for greater accuracy in predicting celestial movements. These new models revealed that the Earth was not flat but instead shaped like a sphere. The first person known to have proposed a spherical Earth model was Pythagoras around 500 BC. He argued that the Earth was round because ships sailing west eventually disappeared below the horizon while those traveling east remained visible until reaching the opposite shore. Aristotle also supported the idea of a spherical Earth based on his observations of the heavens. His ideas were further refined by Eratosthenes who calculated the circumference of the Earth using latitude and longitude measurements.  

Eventually, these theories were accepted by most people throughout Europe and the Mediterranean region during the Middle Ages. However, some individuals still held onto the notion of a flat Earth even after its scientific disproval. For example, in the early modern period, many Christians continued to hold onto the idea of a flat Earth out of fears that accepting a spherical Earth would contradict religious teachings about God creating the world in six days. It wasn't until the Age of Discovery began in the late fifteenth century that evidence of a spherical Earth became widely accepted among scientists and explorers alike.

instruction: What is Gremolata?
output:
Gremolada (also known as gremolato) is a classic Italian condiment made from garlic, parsley and lemon zest. It can be used to flavor pasta dishes, grilled meats or fish, salads, soups and more. 
The name “gremolata” comes from the Italian word for “little crumbs,” which refers to its texture—it’s usually served in small pieces or crumbles. The ingredients are typically minced together until they form a paste-like consistency. 
To make it, you need three main components: finely chopped garlic, freshly picked parsley leaves and zested lemons. You can also add other herbs like thyme, rosemary or oregano if desired. Once all of your ingredients have been gathered, simply mince them together with a knife or processor until everything has been combined into a smooth mixture. Store any extra in an air tight container in the refrigerator up to one week. 
When ready to use, just spread some onto your favorite dish! Enjoy!

instruction: Why did humans evolve to believe in God?
output:
Humans have long been fascinated by questions of existence and purpose, leading many people over time to turn their attention towards religion as a way to explain these mysteries. One theory suggests that our belief in gods may be rooted in our evolutionary past; it has been suggested that religious or spiritual beliefs can help us make sense of the world around us, provide comfort during difficult times, and give meaning to life. 

The idea that we are hardwired for faith stems from research into human behavior which shows that children tend to develop religious or spiritual beliefs at similar stages regardless of culture or background. This could suggest that there is something innate about this type of thinking, rather than it being learned through socialization. Additionally, studies show that when faced with stressful situations such as death or illness, individuals often look to some form of higher power for solace and guidance – suggesting that our need for faith is deeply ingrained within us.  

Furthermore, research on brain activity indicates that certain areas of the brain become active when contemplating matters related to god or spirituality. These regions include the frontal lobe (which helps regulate emotions), the parietal lobe (which processes sensory information) and the temporal lobes (which play a role in memory). It’s possible then, that these parts of the brain are responsible for triggering feelings of wonderment and awe associated with believing in a divine force. 

In conclusion, while the exact reasons why humans developed a tendency toward faith remain unclear, evidence points to the notion that our brains are wired to seek out answers regarding existential topics like mortality and purpose. Our desire to understand the unknown and search for meaning in life likely played a key role in the development of religions and spiritual practices throughout history.

instruction: what should i build a cabin out of?
output:
Building a cabin requires careful planning and consideration to ensure it's built correctly, safely and efficiently. The type of materials used for construction will depend on your budget, location and desired look. Generally speaking, there are four main types of building materials commonly used in cabins - wood, stone, metal and insulated panels. 
Wood is one of the most popular choices as it’s relatively easy to work with and can be customized according to individual preferences. It also provides good insulation from heat and cold. However, it does require more maintenance than other options such as stone or metal. Wooden logs are often used for exterior walls while timber framing is common for roof structures.
Stone is another great option due to its durability and natural beauty. It is typically less expensive than wood but may take longer to construct since each piece must be cut individually. Stone is fireproof and resistant to rot and insect damage which makes it ideal for areas prone to wildfires or high humidity.
Metal is strong yet lightweight making it perfect for small cabins or those located in remote locations where transportation costs would be prohibitive. Metal buildings are quicker to assemble compared to wooden ones and come pre-fabricated so they don’t need to be custom made like stone or log homes do. They are also highly energy efficient and provide excellent protection against wind, rain and snow.
Insulated panel systems offer many advantages including speedy installation, low cost and superior energy efficiency. These panels consist of rigid foam core sandwiched between two thin layers of steel or aluminum. They are available in various thicknesses depending on the climate zone you live in and can be designed to fit any shape structure. Insulated panels are virtually maintenance free and have a long lifespan.

instruction: Why do a lot of Scientists not believe in God or Satan?
output:
Scientists generally don't believe in gods and devils because there isn’t any evidence to support their existence, nor are they able to be tested scientifically. The majority of scientists accept evolution as fact due to its overwhelming amount of supporting evidence, but many also reject creationism for similar reasons; it cannot be proven through science and has no basis in reality. 
The same goes for other supernatural beliefs such as angels, demons, heaven and hell. There have been numerous attempts by religious groups to prove these concepts using scientific methods, however none have succeeded thus far. This lack of proof means that most scientists remain skeptical about the validity of these claims until further evidence can be provided. 
Many people argue that faith should be enough to justify believing in something without needing physical proof. However, this type of reasoning does not sit well with those who adhere to the scientific method which requires tangible evidence before accepting anything as true. As such, religion and spirituality often clashes with science since one relies on faith while the other seeks empirical data.  
In conclusion, although some scientists may personally hold certain religious views, when it comes down to it, they must rely solely on facts and evidence if they want to make informed decisions. Without sufficient proof, most will continue to refrain from making assumptions regarding gods and devils.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Mauritian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Mine Frite?
output:
Mine Frites (Fried Fish)
Ingredients:
- 2 cups all purpose flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 3 tablespoons vegetable oil
- 4 large fish fillets (such as cod or tilapia), cut into small cubes
- ¼ cup chopped onion
- 2 green chilies, minced
Instructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder and salt. Set aside.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat until it reaches 350°F.
3. Add the fish cubes to the dry ingredient mixture and toss to coat evenly.
4. Carefully add the coated fish pieces to the hot oil and fry for about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally so they don’t stick to each other.
5. Meanwhile, in another pan, sauté the onions and chili peppers with a pinch of salt until softened.
6. Once the fish is golden brown, remove them from the skillet using a slotted spoon and place onto paper towels to absorb excess oil.
7. Serve the mine frites immediately with the onion and chilli mixture. Enjoy!

instruction: Why can I see the moon during the day?
output:
The Moon appears in the sky during the day because of its position relative to Earth and the Sun. The Moon orbits around Earth, but it does not orbit directly above the same spot on Earth's surface; instead, it moves through different positions called "librations". When the Moon passes between the Sun and Earth, we are able to view the illuminated side of the Moon facing towards us. This phenomenon occurs at various times throughout the year depending upon where the Moon is in relation to the Sun. 

When viewed from Earth’s perspective, the Moon looks like it has phases just as the sun does - waxing crescent, first quarter, waxing gibbous, full moon, waning gibbous, third quarter, waning crescent. During each phase, the amount of light reflected by the Moon changes due to its changing angle with respect to the Sun. At some points during this cycle, the Moon will be completely illuminated while other parts of the lunar disk may remain in shadow. It takes about one month for the Moon to go through all four phases. 

In addition to libration, another factor affecting our ability to observe the Moon during the day is atmospheric conditions such as cloud cover. If there are no clouds blocking out direct sunlight, then we have a better chance of seeing the Moon during the daytime hours. Additionally, if you happen to live near the equator, your chances of observing the Moon during the day increase since the Moon travels closer to the horizon when passing over these regions than anywhere else on Earth.

instruction: How do I take care of a wooden table?
output:
Taking good care of your wood furniture will help it last for years and keep its natural beauty. Here are some tips to maintaining your wooden table in top condition: 
- Clean with mild soap and warm water - never use abrasive cleaners or polishes on the surface as they can damage the finish. 
- Use coasters underneath hot drinks, glasses and other items to prevent staining from spills. 
- Avoid placing heavy objects such as books and plants directly onto the tabletop; instead place them on a side table or shelf. 
- Periodically dust the table using a soft cloth dampened with warm water. 
- If you notice any scratches or chips in the finish, lightly sand the area with fine grit sandpaper and then apply a few drops of mineral oil to restore the luster. 
- To protect against moisture, periodically rub the table down with a thin layer of food-grade mineral oil. 
- Regularly check the joints and screws for looseness and tighten if necessary.

instruction: What year was the Yamato Battleship built?
output: The Yamato battleship, also known as the Imperial Japanese Navy's "super-battleship", was designed and constructed in 1940–1942 by the Yokosuka Naval Arsenal at Tokyo Bay. It was launched on December 8th of 1941 and completed in September of 1942. The ship had a displacement of over 63,500 tons and was armed with nine 46 cm (18.1 in) main guns, making it one of the most powerful warships ever built during World War II. Despite its immense size and firepower, the Yamato never saw action due to Japan’s surrender in August of 1945. After the end of WWII, the vessel was used for target practice before being sunk in June of 1947.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Danish dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Flæskesteg?
output:
Flæskesteg (Roast Pork with Crackling) is a traditional Danish Christmas dish made with roasted pork belly seasoned with salt, pepper, allspice and cloves. The cracklings are crispy and delicious when served alongside the tender meat. It can be served as part of a larger feast or enjoyed on its own as a hearty main course. Here's how to make it:
Ingredients:
- 2 kg/4 lb pork belly
- Salt
- Peppercorns
- Allspice berries
- Clove sticks
Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C/395°F.
2. Rub the pork belly liberally with salt and pepper. Place the allspice berries and clove sticks into small openings along the length of the pork belly.
3. Place the pork onto a rack over a baking sheet lined with foil. Insert two more pieces of foil underneath the rack so that any juices will not leak out while cooking.
4. Roast in preheated oven until the internal temperature reaches 75–80°C/165–170°F, about 2 hours.
5. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing thinly against the grain. Serve warm with your favorite side dishes. Enjoy!

instruction: Please tell me about the romantic relationship between Julius Caesar and Cleopatra.
output: Julius Caesar and Cleopatra had a passionate, but ultimately doomed, love affair which began in 59 BCE when Julius was serving as governor of Roman-controlled Egypt. The two were immediately drawn to each other; Julius described her as “the most beautiful woman he ever saw.” They quickly became lovers despite their cultural differences – Julius being a Roman and Cleopatra an Egyptian – and their age difference (Cleopatra was only 18 at the time). Their relationship lasted for several years until Julius’s death in 44 BCE. After his assassination, she mourned him deeply and even attempted suicide by poisoning herself with an asp. She eventually gave up on life and allowed herself to be defeated by Octavian, who then took control of Egypt. Despite this tragic ending, it is said that they shared a deep bond of love and respect throughout their short-lived relationship.

instruction: Hi, I'm in the mood for a Bloody Mary. Can you give me a recipe for making one?
output:
Ingredients: 2 oz vodka, 1/4 cup tomato juice, 3 dashes Worcestershire sauce, 1 teaspoon celery salt, 1 lime wedge, black pepper to taste, hot sauce of your choice (optional)

Add the Worcestershire sauce, celery salt, lime wedge, and black pepper to taste. Garnish with a lemon or orange slice and a sprinkle of hot sauce if desired. Enjoy!
